title: Contaminate applies 5 recurring damage while equipped

card.rawText: Equip this card to your primary creature. Once per turn cycle the equipped creature receives 5 damage. When the equipped creature is killed by Atk damage, equip this card to the creature that killed it.

effect.value: Equip this card to your primary creature. Once per turn cycle the equipped creature receives 5 damage. When the equipped creature is killed by Atk damage, equip this card to the creature that killed it.

plan.title: Contaminate applies 5 recurring damage while equipped
plan.summary: Equip Contaminate and verify the equipped primary gets a non-stacking 5 damage recurring effect.

notes: Read text first: Equip this card to your primary creature. Once per turn cycle the equipped creature receives 5 damage. When the equipped creature is killed by Atk damage, equip this card to the creature that killed it.

expectedAssertions.label: Equipped creature has 5 damage over time

manualVerification: A later route should verify transfer to the killing creature after attack-damage death.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Equip Contaminate and verify the equipped primary gets a non-stacking 5 damage recurring effect.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
